case_title: THEODORE C. LOEWENBERG VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-16-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-16-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM - PLAINTIFF THEODORE C. LOEWENBERG IS PRESENT.
